title: King C. Gillette Style Master, Beard Trimmer, Stubble Trimmer & Electric Shaver with One 4D Blade, Electric Razor for Men with 3 Comb Attachments
features: King C. Gillette Style Master Beard Trimmer, cordless, lasting 45 minutes of trimming with 1 full charge
For versatile, multi-purpose stubble shaving, edging, and trimming with both upward and downward motions
Fully waterproof, the Style Master Beard Trimmer features a slim, easy-to-grip rubberised handle for maximum precision
Includes 1 replaceable, long-lasting 4D blade that stay sharp for up to 6 months
It comes with 3 interchangeable combs for different lengths
description: Product Description The cordless, multifunctional King C. Gillette Style Master is your one-solution tool for edging and trimming any beard style. It features a symmetrical comb for bi-directional movement, side cutters and a dolphin-tip design for one-stroke efficiency, and 4 cutting elements to reach long and short hair. It comes with 1 exchangeable blade with up to 6 months of durability and 3 interchangeable combs for flexible trimming. Reach real closeness and skin comfort thanks to the 4D blade technology. Directions Instructions for use: Safety Warning Use with caution near water, be aware of potential skin irritation during styling, and follow standard lithium-ion battery safety guidelines. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
